hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-zinc-50
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight text-zinc-50

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Massive elements left aligned to establish tension. Grids asymmetric.

components_strategy.navigation: Crystal Glass header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-zinc-950/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5. Must include Logo and 'Book Consultation' primary button.
components_strategy.hero: Full viewport height min-h-[90vh]. Uses the luxury hospital room background image with a heavy bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text legibility. Left-aligned typography. Contains lead capture form or anchor link to it.
components_strategy.lead_form: Shadcn Form embedded within a Glassmorphism container. Dark inputs (bg-zinc-900/50 border-white/10) with gold focus rings (focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-[#D4AF37]). Captures Name, Surname, Email, Phone, Language.
components_strategy.whatsapp_cta: Fixed floating button at bottom-right (z-50). Must be highly visible, using the signature green, with a subtle pulsing animation or glow.
components_strategy.bento_features: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid for Clinic / Surgeon / Hospital details. Combine photography and text in asymmetric cards.
components_strategy.testimonials: Dark minimalist cards (bg-zinc-900). Use muted gold stars for ratings. High contrast for the review text.
components_strategy.gallery: B&A / Success Gallery: Grid of high-quality images. Subtle scale-105 transition on hover. No jarring borders.

hero_background.description: Luxury modern hospital private suite, dark cinematic lighting. Use in hero section with heavy bg-black/60 overlay.

surgeon_portrait.description: Portrait of a focused surgeon in scrubs. Use in the 'Meet the Surgeon' section.

hospital_exterior.description: Modern hospital building exterior. Use for the 'World-Class Facility' section.

success_patient.description: Healthy confident person outdoors. Use in B&A or Success Stories section to depict positive outcomes.

abstract_accent.description: Abstract dark obsidian and champagne gold waves. Use as a background texture for the Contact/CTA section.

interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and intensify in color or glow.
interactions.glass_panels: Hover effect: increase border opacity (border-white/20) and slight background lightness shift.
interactions.animations: Use subtle fade-in-up (opacity-0 translate-y-8 to opacity-100 translate-y-0) on scroll using framer-motion or simple CSS.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., 'lead-form-submit-button', 'whatsapp-floating-btn', 'nav-consultation-btn', 'language-select').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Playfair Display and Outfit via Google Fonts.
Install 'lucide-react' for icons (e.g., WhatsApp, phone, mail, checkmarks).
Build the page using raw HTML/Tailwind for the artistic layouts, and Shadcn UI strictly for interactive elements like the Form, Select (Language), and Inputs.
Ensure all text remains accessible over dark backgrounds or images. NEVER use pure black/white overlays, use tinted/gradient overlays.
Implement the lead capture form pointing to a mock CRM endpoint (e.g., console.log the payload and show a success state).
Place the WhatsApp CTA as a fixed element, visible globally on the page.
Execute the dark premium aesthetic faithfully. It must feel like an expensive, trustworthy, 5-star healthcare experience.
